meta.title: Did Ukraine DENY intercepting Russia's 'hypersonic' Kinzhal missile?
meta.description:
With news of Ukraine intercepting Russia's mega-hyped "hypersonic" Kinzhal missile over Kyiv, there's been a flood of people online claiming that Ukraine has denied the intercept took place. 

Here's what happened, and the truth about Ukraine's "denial." 

#Ukraine #ukrainewar #kinzhal #airpower #military #defense #tech #news #short #shorts
